---
title: "Sollicitatie Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import yaml
import pandas as pd
from datetime import date, timedelta
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from IPython.display import HTML

# ── Load data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
tracker_path = Path("tracker.yml")
with open(tracker_path) as f:
    data = yaml.safe_load(f)

apps = data.get("applications", [])
df = pd.DataFrame(apps) if apps else pd.DataFrame(
    columns=["id","bedrijf","functie","datum_gevonden","datum_verstuurd",
             "salaris_range","status","gesprek_datum","notities"]
)

STATUS_ORDER = ["concept", "verstuurd", "gesprek", "aangeboden", "afgewezen", "geaccepteerd"]
STATUS_COLORS = {
    "concept":      "#94a3b8",
    "verstuurd":    "#3b82f6",
    "gesprek":      "#f59e0b",
    "aangeboden":   "#8b5cf6",
    "afgewezen":    "#ef4444",
    "geaccepteerd": "#22c55e",
}

TODAY = pd.Timestamp(date.today())

if not df.empty:
    df["status"] = pd.Categorical(df["status"], categories=STATUS_ORDER, ordered=True)
    for col in ["datum_gevonden", "datum_verstuurd", "gesprek_datum"]:
        df[col] = pd.to_datetime(df[col], errors="coerce")
```

```{python}
# ── Header stats ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
totaal      = len(df)
verstuurd_n = int(df["status"].isin(["verstuurd","gesprek","aangeboden","geaccepteerd"]).sum()) if not df.empty else 0
gesprekken  = int(df["status"].isin(["gesprek","aangeboden","geaccepteerd"]).sum()) if not df.empty else 0
aanbiedingen= int(df["status"].isin(["aangeboden","geaccepteerd"]).sum()) if not df.empty else 0
actief      = int(df["status"].isin(["verstuurd","gesprek","aangeboden"]).sum()) if not df.empty else 0

def stat_card(value, label, bg, border, text_color):
    return (
        f'<div style="background:{bg};border:1px solid {border};border-radius:8px;'
        f'padding:1.2rem 2rem;text-align:center;min-width:110px;">'
        f'<div style="font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;color:{text_color};">{value}</div>'
        f'<div style="color:#64748b;font-size:.9rem;">{label}</div></div>'
    )

HTML(
    '<div style="display:flex;gap:1.2rem;margin-bottom:2rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">'
    + stat_card(totaal,       "Totaal",      "#f8fafc", "#e2e8f0", "#1e293b")
    + stat_card(actief,       "Actief",      "#eff6ff", "#bfdbfe", "#3b82f6")
    + stat_card(verstuurd_n,  "Verstuurd",   "#eff6ff", "#bfdbfe", "#3b82f6")
    + stat_card(gesprekken,   "Gesprekken",  "#fffbeb", "#fde68a", "#f59e0b")
    + stat_card(aanbiedingen, "Aanbiedingen","#f5f3ff", "#ddd6fe", "#8b5cf6")
    + '</div>'
)
```

## Status Pipeline

```{python}
if df.empty:
    print("Geen sollicitaties gevonden.")
else:
    counts = df["status"].value_counts().reindex(STATUS_ORDER, fill_value=0)
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 2.8))
    bars = ax.barh(
        counts.index, counts.values,
        color=[STATUS_COLORS.get(s, "#94a3b8") for s in counts.index],
        height=0.55, edgecolor="white",
    )
    for bar, val in zip(bars, counts.values):
        if val > 0:
            ax.text(bar.get_width() + 0.05, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height() / 2,
                    str(val), va="center", ha="left", fontsize=11, color="#334155")
    ax.set_xlim(0, max(counts.values.max() + 1, 3))
    ax.set_xlabel("Aantal", fontsize=10, color="#64748b")
    ax.tick_params(axis="y", labelsize=11)
    ax.tick_params(axis="x", labelsize=9, colors="#94a3b8")
    ax.spines[["top", "right", "left"]].set_visible(False)
    ax.xaxis.set_tick_params(length=0)
    ax.set_facecolor("white")
    fig.patch.set_facecolor("white")
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
```

## Conversie Funnel

```{python}
if df.empty or verstuurd_n == 0:
    print("Vul datum_verstuurd in om de conversie te zien.")
else:
    stages = [
        ("Verstuurd", verstuurd_n,  STATUS_COLORS["verstuurd"]),
        ("Gesprek",   gesprekken,   STATUS_COLORS["gesprek"]),
        ("Aangeboden",aanbiedingen, STATUS_COLORS["aangeboden"]),
    ]
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 2.2))
    for i, (label, n, color) in enumerate(stages):
        width = n / verstuurd_n if verstuurd_n else 0
        ax.barh(i, width, color=color, height=0.5, edgecolor="white")
        pct = f"{width*100:.0f}%" if i > 0 else "100%"
        ax.text(width + 0.01, i, f"{label}: {n}  ({pct})",
                va="center", ha="left", fontsize=10, color="#334155")
    ax.set_xlim(0, 1.6)
    ax.set_yticks([])
    ax.spines[["top","right","left","bottom"]].set_visible(False)
    ax.set_xticks([])
    ax.set_facecolor("white")
    fig.patch.set_facecolor("white")
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
```

## Needs Attention

```{python}
STALE_DAYS = 14   # concept applications older than this are flagged
FOLLOWUP_DAYS = 7 # sent applications with no response after this many days

attention: list[str] = []

if not df.empty:
    # Stale concept applications
    concept = df[df["status"] == "concept"].copy()
    for _, row in concept.iterrows():
        if pd.notna(row["datum_gevonden"]):
            age = (TODAY - row["datum_gevonden"]).days
            if age >= STALE_DAYS:
                attention.append(
                    f'<li><b>{row["bedrijf"] or row["id"]}</b> — {row["functie"] or "?"} '
                    f'<span style="color:#94a3b8;font-size:.85rem;">concept al {age} dagen</span></li>'
                )

    # Sent with no response
    sent = df[df["status"] == "verstuurd"].copy()
    for _, row in sent.iterrows():
        if pd.notna(row["datum_verstuurd"]):
            age = (TODAY - row["datum_verstuurd"]).days
            if age >= FOLLOWUP_DAYS:
                attention.append(
                    f'<li><b>{row["bedrijf"] or row["id"]}</b> — {row["functie"] or "?"} '
                    f'<span style="color:#94a3b8;font-size:.85rem;">verstuurd {age} dagen geleden, nog geen reactie</span></li>'
                )

if attention:
    HTML(
        '<div style="background:#fefce8;border:1px solid #fde68a;border-radius:8px;padding:1rem 1.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">'
        '<b style="color:#92400e;">Actie vereist</b><ul style="margin:.5rem 0 0 0;padding-left:1.2rem;">'
        + "".join(attention)
        + "</ul></div>"
    )
else:
    HTML('<div style="color:#64748b;font-size:.9rem;">Geen actiepunten — alles is up to date.</div>')
```

## Overzicht

```{python}
if df.empty:
    print("Geen sollicitaties gevonden.")
else:
    disp = df[["datum_gevonden","bedrijf","functie","salaris_range","status",
               "datum_verstuurd","gesprek_datum","notities"]].copy()
    disp = disp.sort_values("datum_gevonden", ascending=False)

    # Days since sent
    disp["dagen"] = disp["datum_verstuurd"].apply(
        lambda d: str((TODAY - d).days) + "d" if pd.notna(d) else "—"
    )

    # Format dates
    disp["datum_gevonden"]  = disp["datum_gevonden"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d").fillna("—")
    disp["datum_verstuurd"] = disp["datum_verstuurd"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d").fillna("—")
    disp["gesprek_datum"]   = disp["gesprek_datum"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d").fillna("—")
    disp["status"] = disp["status"].astype(str)
    disp = disp.fillna("—")

    def badge(status):
        c = STATUS_COLORS.get(status, "#94a3b8")
        return (f'<span style="background:{c};color:white;padding:2px 8px;'
                f'border-radius:12px;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap;">{status}</span>')

    col_map = {
        "datum_gevonden": "Gevonden", "bedrijf": "Bedrijf", "functie": "Functie",
        "salaris_range": "Salaris", "status": "Status",
        "datum_verstuurd": "Verstuurd", "dagen": "Oud",
        "gesprek_datum": "Gesprek", "notities": "Notities",
    }
    display_cols = list(col_map.keys())
    disp = disp[display_cols].rename(columns=col_map)

    rows_html = ""
    for _, row in disp.iterrows():
        rows_html += "<tr>"
        for col, val in row.items():
            if col == "Status":
                rows_html += f"<td>{badge(val)}</td>"
            else:
                rows_html += f"<td style='font-size:.9rem;white-space:nowrap;'>{val}</td>"
        rows_html += "</tr>"

    th = lambda h: f"<th style='text-align:left;padding:6px 10px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:.83rem;color:#64748b;white-space:nowrap;'>{h}</th>"
    headers = "".join(th(h) for h in disp.columns)

    HTML(f"""
<div style="overflow-x:auto;">
<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-family:sans-serif;">
  <thead><tr style="background:#f8fafc;">{headers}</tr></thead>
  <tbody>{rows_html}</tbody>
</table>
</div>
""")
```

## Timeline

```{python}
sent = df[df["datum_verstuurd"].notna()].copy() if not df.empty else pd.DataFrame()

if sent.empty:
    print("Timeline verschijnt zodra datum_verstuurd is ingevuld.")
else:
    sent = sent.sort_values("datum_verstuurd")
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, max(2, len(sent) * 0.7 + 1)))

    for i, (_, row) in enumerate(sent.iterrows()):
        color = STATUS_COLORS.get(str(row["status"]), "#94a3b8")
        ax.scatter(row["datum_verstuurd"], i, color=color, s=140, zorder=3)
        ax.hlines(i, sent["datum_verstuurd"].min(), row["datum_verstuurd"],
                  colors="#e2e8f0", linewidth=1, zorder=1)
        label = f"{row['bedrijf'] or ''} — {row['functie'] or ''}".strip(" —")
        ax.text(row["datum_verstuurd"], i + 0.18, label,
                va="bottom", ha="center", fontsize=9, color="#334155")

    ax.set_yticks([])
    ax.spines[["top","right","left"]].set_visible(False)
    ax.set_xlabel("Verzenddatum", fontsize=10, color="#64748b")
    ax.set_facecolor("white")
    fig.patch.set_facecolor("white")
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
```

---
*Gegenereerd op `{python} str(date.today())`*
